import urllib.request
import json

sql = ''''''CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.mosques \(
  id text PRIMARY KEY,
  name text NOT NULL,
  address text DEFAULT \\''\\'',
  city text DEFAULT \\''\\'',
  image_url text DEFAULT \\''\\'',
  maps_url text DEFAULT \\''\\'',
  latitude float8 DEFAULT 0,
  longitude float8 DEFAULT 0,
  description text,
  imam text,
  capacity text,
  services text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now\(\),
  updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now\(\)
\);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.events_activities \(
  id text PRIMARY KEY,
  mosque_id text REFERENCES public.mosques\(id\),
  mosque_name text,
  mosque_city text,
  title text NOT NULL,
  description text DEFAULT \\''\\'',
  category_id text DEFAULT \\''lecture\\'',
  type text DEFAULT \\''recurring\\'',
  date date,
  start_time text DEFAULT \\''\\'',
  end_time text,
  day_of_week int2,
  instructor text,
  image_url text DEFAULT \\''\\'',
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now\(\),
  updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now\(\)
\);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.quran_schools \(
  id text PRIMARY KEY,
  name text NOT NULL,
  description text DEFAULT \\''\\'',
  city text DEFAULT \\''\\'',
  address text DEFAULT \\''\\'',
  image_url text DEFAULT \\''\\'',
  phone text,
  email text,
  website text,
  founded text,
  student_count int4,
  programs text[] DEFAULT \\''{}\\'',
  age_range text,
  gender text DEFAULT \\''mixed\\'',
  latitude float8 DEFAULT 0,
  longitude float8 DEFAULT 0,
  maps_url text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now\(\),
  updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now\(\)
\);

ALTER TABLE public.mosques ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE public.events_activities ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE public.quran_schools ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY ""Allow public read"" ON public.mosques FOR SELECT USING \(true\);
CREATE POLICY ""Allow public read"" ON public.events_activities FOR SELECT USING \(true\);
CREATE POLICY ""Allow public read"" ON public.quran_schools FOR SELECT USING \(true\);''''''

payload = json.dumps\({''query'': sql}\).encode\(''utf-8''\)

    data=payload,
    headers={
        ''Authorization'': ''Bearer sbp_7405a1cdc1af8acb990da401187a38f15e1c8a80'',
        ''Content-Type'': ''application/json''
    },
    method=''POST''
\)
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=30\) as resp:
        print\(''Status:'', resp.status\)
        print\(resp.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print\(''HTTP Error:'', e.code\)

except Exception as e:

")
